title: AI Solutions Developer, Finance
company_focus:
Financial infrastructure platform for payments and business
operations
description:
AI Solutions Developer, FinanceWho we areAbout Stripe

Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for
businesses. Millions of companies—from the world's largest
enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to
accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new
business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP
of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work
ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to
put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing
the most important work of your career.

About the team

You'll be joining the Finance Operational Excellence team,
reporting to the Finance AI Solution Architect. Our mission
is to operationalize AI agents at scale for Finance,
supporting the AI Strategy to transform how Finance teams
work. We sit at the intersection of Finance domain
expertise, data engineering, and emerging AI technologies.

We serve as Global AI Solution Architects for Finance,
working with domain AI leaders and SMEs across
Controllership, F&S, Treasury, Tax, Finance Operations and
Facilities. Our goal is not just to build AI solutions, but
to operationalize them—handing off agents to Finance teams
for long-term ownership and adaptation.  This means we teach
while we work. Engineering partners help with complex
technical work and custom tool development, while we deliver
solutions using Agentic AI and other emerging AI tools.

We work within platform constraints creatively, build
reusable knowledge layers, and enable Finance teams to
maintain AI solutions independently. We have deep expertise
in data analysis, process digitalization and applied AI.  If
you have a passion for technology and problem solving, and
are excited about the future of AI at work, keep reading.

What you'll do

You'll work side-by-side with Finance, Product, and
Engineering teams to build and operationalize AI-powered
automation solutions that transform how Finance teams work
at Stripe. You'll work independently to automate manual
processes, design and build agents and required data
solutions using internal platforms, and enable Finance teams
to maintain these solutions long-term.

You'll collaborate closely with Finance subject matter
experts to understand their workflows, translate
requirements into technical solutions, and iterate based on
feedback. When you encounter platform limitations—which you
will—you'll find creative workarounds, collaborate with
Engineering to scope and test custom tools, and escalate
strategically when needed. You'll establish reusable
components to accelerate the portfolio of Finance AI use
cases.

This role requires a blend of process automation, data
operations, technical problem-solving, and stakeholder
enablement. You'll spend your time building agents,
optimizing data pipelines that feed them, creating knowledge
layers that make them more accurate, and training Finance
teams to use and maintain them. Success means Finance teams
can independently run agents you've built while you provide
light support and focus on the next automation opportunity.

Responsibilities

- Build and operationalize AI agents for Finance use cases
  using Agentic Solutions and other automation tools,
  delivering end-to-end solutions from prototype to handoff
- Design reusable knowledge layers, validation patterns, and
  data quality frameworks to improve agent accuracy and
  reliability across multiple use cases
- Identify agentic limitations and new possibilities;
  collaborate with Engineering to scope custom tools and
  integrations (via MCP) when capabilities are insufficient,
  providing requirements, testing implementations, and
  integrating tools into agent workflows
- Work independently to scope automation opportunities,
  navigate platform constraints through creative workarounds
  (pre-coded tools, query chaining, validation agents), and
  strike a balance between speed and quality to deliver
  impact quickly
- Enable Finance teams through training, documentation (SOPs,
  runbooks), and self-service tooling for minimal ongoing
  support
- Be the accountable technical expert with Finance SMEs across
  multiple organizations to understand manual processes,
  translate requirements into technical solutions, and
  iterate based on feedback
- Write and optimize SQL queries for data extraction,
  transformation, and validation that feed agent workflows,
  ensuring data quality and accuracy for Finance use cases
- Establish monitoring and observability for deployed agents,
  including metrics, alerting, and incident response
  processes to ensure reliability
- Serve as the escalation point for technical issues,
  diagnosing problems independently and collaborating with
  Engineering when solutions require deeper platform changes
- Document learnings, patterns, and best practice news
  bulletins for reuse across the Finance AI portfolio,
  contributing to organizational knowledge and scaling
  impact

 Who you are

We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements
to be considered for the role. If you meet these
requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred
qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.

Minimum requirements

- 3+ years of experience in Data Analytics, Technical
  Operations, Business Intelligence, or similar roles
- Experience with emerging AI/LLM tools, conversational
  interfaces, prompt engineering, or automation platforms
  and RPA
- Proficiency in SQL including writing complex queries, using
  CTEs (common table expressions), window functions, and
  joins for data analysis and pipeline logic
- Experience with automation through low-code tools,
  scripting, workflow automation, or building custom
  integrations that extend platform capabilities paired with
  curiosity to learn evolving tools
- Track record of independently scoping and delivering
  technical solutions for process improvement, demonstrating
  self-sufficiency and ownership
- Strong analytical and investigative skills to identify root
  causes of data issues, debug complex problems, and resolve
  inconsistencies
- Understanding of development best practices such as version
  control, testing, code reviews, and iterative development
- Familiarity with modern data tools (Python, Databricks,
  ETL/ELT processes, data pipelines) and coding with AI
  assistance

Preferred qualifications

- Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar
  extensibility frameworks
- Background in Finance Operations, Financial Planning &
  Analysis (FP&A), Accounting, Treasury, or Payments
- Experience navigating the complexity of financial systems
  (accounting, reporting, reconciliation, payments, etc.)
  and understanding how data flows through them
- Experience working in high-growth technology companies with
  rapidly evolving processes and tools



Note on technical depth: This role involves working at the
intersection of no-code AI tools and custom development.
While software engineering expertise is not required, you
should be comfortable learning technical concepts,
collaborating closely with Engineering teams, and using AI-
assisted development tools to extend platform capabilities
when needed.

Location & Team Structure

- Location: Bangalore, India (in-office)
- Reports to: Finance AI Solution Architect
- Collaboration: Work closely with Finance teams globally,
  Engineering partners, and the AI Foundation team
responsibilities: Build and operationalize AI agents for Finance use cases using Agentic Solutions and automation tools, delivering end-to-end solutions from prototype to handoff

Scope automation opportunities independently and navigate platform constraints through creative workarounds
Enable Finance teams through training, documentation, and self-service tooling for long-term ownership

use_cases: Finance process automation using AI agents
Knowledge layer creation for Finance domain accuracy
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves building, operationalizing, and
deploying AI agents for Finance use cases using Agentic AI
tools. The developer creates agents, designs knowledge
layers, builds data pipelines that feed agents, and hands
off working AI solutions to Finance teams—this is hands-on
work deploying AI systems, not just supporting
infrastructure.
